About Meetup

Our Programs

Training Programs ThatDrive Results

01

Leadership

Executive Leadership Development

Equip your leaders with the strategic thinking, emotional intelligence, and decision-making frameworks needed to drive organizational success in today's complex business environment.

  • Strategic vision and goal alignment
  • Emotional intelligence and empathy
  • High-stakes decision making
  • Change management and resilience
Learn More->
02

Communication

Effective Communication & Influence

Build teams that communicate with clarity, confidence, and impact. From boardroom presentations to cross-functional collaboration, we cover every dimension of professional communication.

  • Executive presence and public speaking
  • Negotiation and conflict resolution
  • Storytelling for business impact
  • Stakeholder management
Learn More->
03

Team Performance

High-Performance Team Building

Transform groups into cohesive, high-performing teams. Our evidence-based programs address team dynamics, psychological safety, and the systems that enable sustained excellence.

  • Team dynamics and trust building
  • Psychological safety frameworks
  • Accountability and performance culture
  • Remote and hybrid team effectiveness
Learn More->

Our Story

We Believe in the Power of People

DNA Management was founded on a simple conviction: organizations don't transform - people do. For over 15 years, we've partnered with Fortune 500 companies, growing startups, and public sector organizations to develop the human capabilities that drive lasting change.

Our approach is grounded in behavioral science, adult learning theory, and the hard-won wisdom of practitioners who've led teams through real challenges. We don't deliver off-the-shelf content - every engagement is designed around your specific context, culture, and goals.

From intensive leadership academies to targeted skill-building workshops, we create learning experiences that meet people where they are and help them move with confidence.

Human-Centered

Every program starts with deep listening. We design for your people, not a generic audience.

Evidence-Based

Our methods are grounded in behavioral science and validated by measurable outcomes.

Lasting Impact

We build capabilities that outlast the training room and compound over time.

Start Today

Ready to Build aStronger Team?

Let's design a training program that fits your organization's unique needs, culture, and ambitions. Our team is ready to help.

Schedule a ConsultationView Programs

What to Expect

Our Engagement Process

  • Discovery Call - We learn about your organization, goals, and challenges.

  • Custom Design - We build a program tailored to your specific context.

  • Expert Facilitation - Experienced practitioners deliver engaging, impactful sessions.

  • Sustained Support - Post-training resources and coaching to reinforce learning.

Response Time

We respond to all inquiries within one business day.

Contact Us

Let's Start aConversation

Tell us about your organization and what you're looking to achieve. We'll get back to you within one business day.

Email Us Directly

contact@dnamanagement.com

Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm PST

What Happens Next

A member of our team will review your message and reach out to schedule a discovery call. No pressure, no sales pitch - just a conversation.

Send a Message

Tell Us About Your Goals

Share a bit about your organization and what you're hoping to achieve. We'll tailor our response to your specific situation.

Your Information
Your Training Needs

We respect your privacy. Your information will never be shared with third parties.
